title: Dimensional Shulker Boxes
body:
This small mod add for now only one block, the Dimensional Shulker Box.
You can craft it like this : 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Big Chest recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee6222a7c52274f92a627487d7ac23c377acbaca.png)
![Dimensional Shulker Box recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8259e62d583b7332be84574496cc07a9d32d3e0f.png)

</details>



When you right click it, it let you teleport to a small, per player room of 3x3x3 blocks, where you can store stuff or whatever fits in it.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Shulker Interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe4d5549a6e7fca127c37d91d07a73a2229e8dbb.png)

</details>



Just a vanilla-style pocket dimension, pretty useful if you want to hide your stuff from others, or are like me an explorer :)

And there's a lot more to come !
